estimatorCTA.title: Want to estimate how much your project will cost?
estimatorCTA.description: Get an instant cost estimate in just a few steps. Select your project type, features, and preferences – we'll give you a ballpark figure.

estimator.title: Project Estimator
estimator.headline: What will it cost to build?
estimator.subtitle: Answer a few questions — get an honest price range at real Tashkent market rates, refined by AI. No email required.
estimator.typeHint: Pick the closest match — you can refine everything later.

serviceDesc.mobile: iOS & Android, App Store + Google Play
serviceDesc.web: From landing pages to SaaS platforms
serviceDesc.telegram: Bots, Mini Apps, payments inside Telegram

estimator.platformHint: Both platforms from one cross-platform codebase is the regional default.

approachDesc.cross: One codebase for both platforms — faster and cheaper, native-like quality
approachDesc.native: A separate codebase per platform — maximum performance

estimator.tierHint: This scales QA depth, edge cases and polish.

tierDesc.mvp: Launch fast, validate the idea, core features only
tierDesc.standard: A solid product: thorough QA, edge cases, polish

estimator.screensHint: Count each unique view: login, catalog, cart, profile…
estimator.screensIncluded: {count} screens are already included in the base price
estimator.featuresHint: Prices show the approximate add-on cost. Popular picks for your project type are pre-selected — feel free to untick.
estimator.integrationsHint: Payment systems, SMS, maps and business tools of the Central Asia market — we integrate them all.
estimator.techHint: Optional — pick technologies you prefer, or trust our recommendation. The choice doesn't change the price, except native mobile.
estimator.autoTechDesc: We'll pick the optimal stack for your budget and scale

designDesc.ready: Figma or similar — we build exactly to them (−8%)
designDesc.template: Proven UI patterns adapted to your brand

estimator.languagesHint: Uzbek + Russian is the market standard; add English for international users.
estimator.descriptionHint: One or two sentences help the AI catch scope that checkboxes miss.
estimator.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g.: a delivery app for our restaurant chain in Tashkent with courier tracking and Payme payments…
estimator.indicativeNote: Indicative range at Tashkent market rates. Final quote after a free scoping call.
estimator.resultSub: Built from real Central Asia market rates — not inflated placeholders.
estimator.aiLoading: Our AI is reviewing your scope — usually 20–40 seconds…
estimator.breakdownMultiplier: Scope multiplier (level, design, languages, platforms, urgency)
estimator.breakdownNote: Hours are estimated ranges, not a contract. Integrations are added at fixed effort and are not scaled by the multiplier. The exact quote comes from a short scoping call — usually it lands inside the range above.
estimator.leadSub: We'll review your configuration and reply with a personal quote — usually within one business day.
estimator.leadPrivacy: No spam — one reply from a real developer.
estimator.leadSuccessSub: We got your configuration and will reach out shortly. You can also ping us on Telegram right away.
estimator.leadErrorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
estimator.leadErrorSubmit: Couldn't send — please try again or write to us on Telegram

faq.title: Website creation stages:
faq.description:
A website created by Softwhere is an effective business tool that works 24/7, and we guarantee its proper development and promotion.
It attracts customers to you, increases sales and increases user loyalty.
faq.answer1: In the first stage, you define the goals of your website, content, addresses and prepare the right data. Planning includes making decisions about the structure, design and functions of your site.
faq.answer2: In the second stage, you create the design of your site based on the pre-prepared plan. Here you can develop your brand design, colors, fonts and interface design based on your brand concepts.
faq.answer3: At this stage, code writing begins based on design and functions. Here you will need front-end (client side) and back-end (server logic and data handling) programming.
faq.answer4: In the final stage, the created site is tested and prepared for placement on the Internet. At this stage, it is necessary to conduct all types of tests to detect problems and errors, fix them and present your site to a wide audience.

aiSpotlight.title: We turn your documents into a product that answers questions, drafts work, and takes action.

process.title: Four stages, zero surprises.
process.step1Desc: We define goals, scope and structure, and prepare the right data to build on.
process.step2Desc: Brand, colors, type and interface — a design your users understand instantly.
process.step3Desc: Front-end and back-end engineered together, shipped in reviewable increments.
process.step4Desc: Full testing, then a smooth launch — with a year of free hosting for early clients.
